title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Hayes Recruitment Solutions Limited
body: "Application number 5129  Applicant Hays Plc objected to the name used by Hayes Recruitment Solutions Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 7 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Hayes Recruitment Solutions Limited is changed to 15520001, LTD. "
